prediction.reason: Memphis is gutted by injuries — Ja Morant is out, along with Edey, Aldama, and Clarke. The Grizzlies are 0-3 against the Clippers this season. prediction.reason: Minnesota is on a 5-game win streak and has been one of the most consistent teams in the league recently, winning all their last 5 with margins of +6, +7, +8, and +9. prediction.reason: Brooklyn has lost 10 straight — the longest active losing streak in the NBA. They're getting outscored by nearly 13 points per game over their last 10 and are 7-25 on the road. Detroit is the best team in the league at 45-16 and is 24-7 at home. Cade Cunningham is questionable, which slightly narrows the gap, but the talent difference is simply too large. Detroit has already beaten Brooklyn twice this season.
prediction.reason_es: Brooklyn lleva 10 derrotas seguidas — la racha de derrotas más larga activa en la NBA. Están siendo superados por casi 13 puntos por partido en sus últimos 10 y van 7-25 de visitante. Detroit es el mejor equipo de la liga con 45-16 y va 24-7 en casa. Cade Cunningham es cuestionable, lo que reduce la brecha ligeramente, pero la diferencia de talento es simplemente demasiado grande. Detroit ya venció a Brooklyn dos veces esta temporada.
